subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! Thy letters are received. Praise be to God, the convention of this year has been held with the utmost magnificence
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @unity of thought and belief, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity
